key_factors: No material information found in headlines

llm_analysis.rationale: The news headlines contain only preview content, betting promotions, and transfer speculation about Son Heung-min potentially moving to LAFC. However, there is no confirmation that this affects his availability for this match, nor any indication he is absent or distracted. No reports of injuries, suspensions, squad turmoil, or tactical surprises for either team. The transfer rumors appear to be long-term speculation rather than immediate concerns. Without lineups, player ratings, or concrete team news that the statistical model cannot capture, no adjustment to the base probabilities is warrant
